creativeLibrary.name: Education-First Awareness - LinkedIn
creativeLibrary.headline: Real Estate Investment. Reimagined.
creativeLibrary.body: Discover how tokenization is making Dubai prime property investment accessible. Curated opportunities, institutional-grade due diligence, starting from $100.

creativeLibrary.name: Fractional Ownership Explainer - Google Display
creativeLibrary.headline: Own Dubai Property from $100
creativeLibrary.body: Fractional real estate investment through blockchain technology. Regulated, transparent, and accessible.

creativeLibrary.name: Investor Education - LinkedIn Carousel
creativeLibrary.headline: 4 Reasons to Consider Tokenized Real Estate
creativeLibrary.body: Slide 1: Access to prime Dubai properties. Slide 2: Institutional-grade due diligence. Slide 3: Starting from $100. Slide 4: Secondary market flexibility.

creativeLibrary.name: Developer Outreach - LinkedIn
creativeLibrary.headline: Unlock Capital from Your Real Estate Portfolio
creativeLibrary.body: Tokenize your properties and access a global investor base. Blocks helps developers raise capital efficiently.

creativeLibrary.name: Brand Awareness - Meta (Facebook/Instagram)
creativeLibrary.headline: Dubai Real Estate, Tokenized
creativeLibrary.body: The future of property investment is here. Browse curated opportunities on Blocks.

creativeLibrary.name: Arabic Market - LinkedIn Native
creativeLibrary.headline: استثمر في العقارات في دبي من 100 دولار
creativeLibrary.body: استثمر في عقارات دبي الفاخرة من خلال التوكين الرقمي. منصة منظمة وشفافة مع فرص استثمارية مدروسة.

creativeLibrary.name: Secondary Market Launch - Email to Holders
creativeLibrary.headline: Now You Can Trade Tokens on the Secondary Market
creativeLibrary.body: Existing token holders can now list and sell their tokens. Trade with other verified investors on the Blocks platform.

creativeLibrary.name: Market Education - YouTube Pre-roll
creativeLibrary.headline: What Is Tokenized Real Estate?
creativeLibrary.body: A 60-second explainer on how tokenized real estate works and why it's changing property investment.

avoidList.riskRationale: Implies immediate ability to sell tokens, which may not reflect actual secondary market conditions.
avoidList.approvedAlternative: Secondary market access with trading subject to demand

avoidList.riskRationale: Prohibited by Google Ads policy and UAE securities regulations. Misleading to investors.
avoidList.approvedAlternative: Target returns based on historical performance

avoidList.riskRationale: Prohibited by Meta advertising policies. Creates unrealistic expectations.
avoidList.approvedAlternative: Build long-term wealth through real estate

avoidList.phrase: Like crypto but for real estate
avoidList.riskRationale: Creates inappropriate crypto association. Positioning guardrail violation.
False claim. All investments carry risk. Prohibited by Google Ads policies.
avoidList.approvedAlternative: Managed risk investment with diversified portfolio options

avoidList.riskRationale: Inappropriate comparison to securities trading. May create regulatory exposure.
avoidList.approvedAlternative: Trade tokens on the Blocks secondary market

avoidList.riskRationale: Prohibited by Meta. Could be flagged as misleading promotion.
